narrative:
Pleasant Twp (precinct in Putnam County) has 1,157 registered voters, with 45.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 42.7 percentage points.
